name: Hipster vs Rockers
author: Poki
description: Hipster vs Rockers is a dress up game where you can choose to dress up the hipsters, or the rockers! Don't forget to take a photo at the end.  About the creator: Hipster vs Rockers was created by Go Panda Games. This is their fifth game on Poki after Baby Race Galaxy, Funny Rescue Zookeeper, Funny Nose Surgery and Creative Puzzle!
